text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #11)
Are you sure you did this:
> Build self both ports.
> Also get sources for 13.3-p2 and update system to 13.3-p2.
?

It's almost certainly due to the dirty environment.
As I said before - I have 8 hosts with VB 6 and it build and work fine.
